metadata.title: BNB Groupe | Leading Distribution Company in DRC
metadata.description: BNB Groupe - The largest distribution company in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Discover our services, products and international presence.
metadata.keywords: BNB Groupe, Biso Na Biso, distribution, DRC, Congo, Kinshasa, products, FMCG

hero.title: BNB Groupe
hero.subtitle: Leading Distribution Company in the Democratic Republic of Congo
hero.description: Since 1997, we have been connecting major international brands to millions of consumers in the DRC with excellence and innovation.

about.title: About BNB Groupe
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.description: Société Biso Na Biso Sarl is the largest and fastest-growing distribution company in the Democratic Republic of Congo. We address the daily needs of millions of consumers in food and non-food categories through a value proposition based on quality products at competitive prices.
about.missionText: To serve our communities to live a better life.
about.visionText: To become the preferred distribution partner for major global brands in the DRC.

focusBrand.title: Focus Brand
focusBrand.subtitle: Our Own Brands
focusBrand.description: BNB Groupe develops and markets its own brands with excellence. Our brand development expertise allows us to offer quality products tailored to the needs of Congolese consumers.

csr.title: Corporate Social Responsibility
csr.subtitle: Zarina Foundation
csr.description: BNB Groupe recognizes its social responsibility through the Zarina Foundation, working to improve the socio-economic conditions of populations in the DRC.

career.title: Career
career.subtitle: Join Us
career.description: BNB Groupe is a great place to learn while you earn. We have a performance-driven and cohesive culture where we strive to work together to achieve more.
career.benefitsDesc: Accommodation, medical facilities, food and transportation
